name: ip_attestation_check
description: Suede Registry IP attestation lookup for agents, marketplaces, ad networks, content moderation pipelines, sync clearance tools, AI training data auditors, and any workflow that needs to verify whether a given asset hash is registered on the Suede IP Registry on Base. Returns registration status, on-chain attestation transaction hash, registrant wallet address, asset kind (music, video, image, audio), registration timestamp, and any associated license terms. High-frequency, low-latency endpoint suitable for per-request licensing checks, dispute review, ownership disclosure, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows.

asset_hash.description: SHA-256 or keccak-256 hex digest of the asset. Accepts 64-char hex with or without 0x prefix.

include_license.description: Whether to include attached license terms in the response. Adds a small latency cost; leave false for fastest registration-only checks.
